instruction: Please write something up for the Harbor Lab mentor check-ins and save it in /Programs/Mentoring. Title it "Harbor Lab Mentor Check-In Outline" and include the student's current build, any blockers, feedback from the mentor, and the next step to follow up on before the next meeting.

rule_ref.rule_text: When he starts a reusable planning artifact for recurring workshops, mentorship sessions, or checklists, Joseph prefers a template rather than an ordinary one-off note.
rule_ref.canonical_answer: For something I expect to reuse, I prefer a template instead of a one-off document.

attributes.title: Harbor Lab Kickoff Notes
attributes.content_brief: Notes from the first Harbor Lab mentor meeting covering student introductions, project ideas, and early questions.

attributes.title: Mentor Follow-Up Memo
attributes.content_brief: Short reminder for mentors about sending recap emails after a student session and logging any promised introductions.

attributes.title: Open Bench Workshop Recap
attributes.content_brief: Summary of attendance, soldering issues, and materials used during the last hands-on electronics workshop.

attributes.title: Equipment Checkout Sheet
attributes.content_brief: Blank format for recording borrowed tools, borrower name, checkout date, and return condition.
